required_preferences.fact: Does not engage in any carving work at all due to therapist's orders; focuses only on finishing and packaging existing items during allowed work sessions

supersedes.fact: Completes all carving work in morning sessions — leaves finishing and packaging for evenings

required_preferences.fact: No longer reads late at night; chooses short, calming activities (e.g., brief mindfulness meditation or gentle stretching) before the strictly scheduled bedtime to improve sleep quality per CPAP regimen

supersedes.fact: Reads paper books on woodworking techniques late at night — never uses digital guides or ebooks

required_preferences.fact: Performs a brief wind-down routine, including setting up the CPAP device, dimming lights, and 5 minutes of guided breathing before bed
Runs social media ads only for new product launches — never for ongoing items
Follows a strict, physician-mandated bedtime each night to support CPAP use — avoids all stimulating activities after 9pm
Plans quarterly family day trips to nearby towns — never goes on overnight vacations

persona: A stay-at-home parent running a handmade crafts shop on Etsy
